MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-16-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID J BRILLIANT FOR PLAINTIFF VINCENT KIRCHER WITH BRUCE SANDIFER, PROPERTY MANAGER
DEFENDANT DANIEL HENRY IN PRO PER

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT AS INDICATED ABOVE. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT WERE READ AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TO RESUME PAYING RENT ON JANUARY 15, 2005. THE AMOUNT OF $300.00 IS DUE ON THE 1ST AND 15TH OF EACH MONTH. DEFENDANT OWES A TOTAL SUM OF $2,238.30 ($850.00 BACK RENT, $640.00 RENT FROM NOV. 15 - DEC 16, 2004, $640.00 ONE MONTH RENT, $148.30 COSTS OF SUIT). IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY, PLAINTIFF MAY, WITH 24 HR NOTICE, SEEK AN EX PARTE JUDGMENT AND A WRIT OF EXECUTION MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY.

JPT PETER HADIARIS, CLERK CLARK BANAYAD, REPORTER JOANN BRYCE (218)
